required_controls: Require purchase, supply, furnish, delivery, rental, or product-list evidence for goods classification.
Prefer maintenance or repair service classification when the title or substantive scope states maintenance or repair.
Preserve medical equipment as the serviced asset without converting the opportunity into a product procurement.
Do not assign staffing from the phrase personnel services alone.
Require temporary labor, staff augmentation, recruitment, placement, contingent labor, or workforce-supply context.
Exclude occupational medical care, clinical services, investigative services, and ordinary vendor personnel references.
Use title and substantive description as primary product evidence.
Treat classification descriptions and generated keywords as corroborating evidence only.
Prevent generic references to computers, servers, vehicles, or equipment from creating product assignments without purchasing context.
Move California contractor-license codes from certification output to license output.
Preserve the original source field and record a source-field conflict flag.
Do not treat trade-license codes as supplier-diversity or quality certifications.

source_normalization_recommendations.action: Map source procurement types into a governed controlled vocabulary while preserving original values.
Treat generated keywords as corroborating evidence only and record keyword-source provenance.
Retain assignment status, source field, code description, and conflict indicators for every classification relationship.

next_validation_gates: Correct the two material primary-capability collisions.
Expand controlled taxonomy coverage using evidence-backed rules.
Demonstrate improved precision and reduced review volume.
Obtain Project Orchestrator approval before merge or production activation.
